title: Ender Moon
description: This add-on for Enhanced Celestials adds an Ender Moon
body:
![Ender Moon header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04386c5223165d854ab0a676cbf85a4efd4bc1f8.png)
During the rare Ender Moon event, the weight of endermen spawns will be greatly increased, and during a Super Ender Moon, all mob spawns will increase by a large amount as well, leading to a world overrun by Endermen.


All credit for Enhanced Celestials goes to Corgi Taco

Join [my Discord](https://discord.gg/kpN4eRbVsS)!
